name: Souperior Italian Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: or Italian Herb with Tomato Recipe Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
3. Shape the mixture into a loaf in a large baking pan.
4. Bake for 1 hour or until done.
5. Also terrific with Lipton Recipe Secrets Beefy Onion, Onion-Mushroom, or Beefy Mushroom Recipe Soup Mix.
6. Taste Tested Recipe from The Lipton Kitchens.
